y the planets:—If
the Navarasa of the Moon is Aries or Scorpio and if she is
aspected by the Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, and
Saturn the effects will be in order (i) a Police officer, (ii) one
fond of murders, (iii) skilled in warfare, (iv) king, (v) wealthy,
and (vi) quarrelsome fellow. If the Ani§a is Taurus or Libra,
the effects are (i) a fool, (ii) one addicted to immoral behaviour,
(iii) a good poet, (iv) author of good literary works, (v) intent
on getting happiness, and (vi) a moral wreck. If the NavamSa

88 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
is Gemini or Virgo, the effects in order are (i) an actor, (ii) thief,
(iii) an eminent poet, (iv) minister, (v) musician, and (vi) clever
artisan.
If the NavaiMa is Cancer, the effects are (i) one of tinj limbs,
(ii) greedy for money, (iii) an ascetic, (iv) an important person,
(v) servant of a woman, and (vi) devoted servant
